{{CargoClone
|name=Archpriest Modun
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=182
|gene1={race} RUSH +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=For Round 1, RUSH DMG +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Minion Skin RUSH +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle,
Troop Wind DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Minion Skin RUSH +50%
|}}
